{{Quote|You gotta admit. It's a nice place for a meeting.|[[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], to [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="Slave Ship">''[[Slave Ship]]''</ref>}}
'''Gholondreine-β''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Chitarghar sector/Legends|Chitarghar sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. Gholondreine-β was the site of one of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] earliest [[Desiccation of Gholondreine-β|atrocities]].

==History==
{{Quote|Standard operating procedure for the Empire. Especially when the Emperor's in his punitive mode.|Boba Fett, to Bossk|<ref name="Slave Ship" />}}
The cities and towns of Gholondreine-β were renowned across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for their scholars and [[Philosopher/Legends|philosophers]], who taught that all sentient beings held their highest loyalty to truth, regardless of temporal consequences.<ref name="TEA" />

The [[Gholondreine]] were reluctant to implement the changes of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], and around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], the planet's scholars began publishing critiques of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] rule. As punishment, [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] ordered the [[Water/Legends|seas]] of the planet [[Desiccation of Gholondreine-β|totally drained]] and the water taken to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The ecological ruined world was then seeded with [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] crawlers that would exude [[Bioweapon/Legends|biotoxins]] into the soil, and abandoned as the inhabitants fled to nearby systems.<ref name="TEA" />

Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] met on the desert world and agreed to team up in the hunt for [[Trhin Voss'on't]].
{{Planet-stub}}
